title: Google is building a chip with Gemini baked into the silicon
summary: Google is reportedly trying something stranger: a chip that is the model, with Gemini’s blueprint etched into the hardware itself. A chip tuned for one model can drop a lot of the overhead a general chip carries.
caption: output/2026-07-20/google-is-building-a-chip-with-gemini-baked-into-the-silicon.txt
